svg.text: /scrum-team · responsibilities · parallelism · documents in / out · feedback loops
Documents flow down the phases: FEATURE-BRIEF → UX-DESIGN + ARCHITECTURE → tasks → code → tests → PR.
Human provides the idea. PO derives the
brief while UX studies the existing UI.
↻ GATE: ARCHITECTURE.md + UX-DESIGN.md + mockups (re-spawns on fail)

text.tspan: mockup-validator FAIL → mockup-designer regenerates → re-validate, then proceed

svg.text: ↻ GATE: ≥2 dev tasks with US prefix (re-spawns on fail)
✓ GATE: Compile gate + all manual tests pass

g.text: Tests each story on the app

text.tspan: manual-tester files bug → dev fixes → code-reviewer approves → manual-tester retests
same test case fails 2× → escalate to tech-lead for root-cause analysis

svg.text: runs only if the diff touches auth / routes
✓ GATE: AC traceability + Definition of Done

text.tspan: any Critical finding → block ship → fix tasks → re-run security-auditor

svg.text: Tech-lead opens the PR from feature/<slug> →
‼ security-auditor is conditional (diff-triggered) · SIZE small/medium/large scales the team to 9/11/13 agents · small skips Phase 2
feature/<slug> → atomic commit per task → PR to main
